query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, awayML, homeML, modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine, gameDate FROM games WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-15' ORDER BY id;
